title: Alerts
subtitle: Connect WhatsApp (OpenWA), manage push, and send notices from the platform session.

whatsapp.title: Platform WhatsApp (AlmaPet)
whatsapp.description: Number used for lost/found alerts and superadmin notices.
whatsapp.disabled: OpenWA is not configured. Set OPENWA_ENABLED, OPENWA_API_URL and OPENWA_API_KEY in .env.
whatsapp.disconnect_description: The platform session will stop sending alerts until you scan the QR again.
whatsapp.test_default_message: AlmaPet ID test: platform WhatsApp is connected.

push.title: Web Push
push.ready: VAPID configured: you can push to subscribed users.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.subtitle: AlmaPet ID network partners. VetSaaS links the clinic to microchip registration.
